summary: i18n Language Switcher Testing Complete. Fixed critical bug where SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES was being overwritten from dict to list, causing language dropdown to show empty. All 11 languages now display correctly with native names.
passed_tests: Language selector dropdown visible in main header (LocaleSelector)
Language selector shows all 11 languages with native names
Switching language updates UI text correctly (English â†’ Spanish â†’ German â†’ French)
Products page filters translate correctly (Filters, Category, Certifications, Origin Country, Price Range)
Products page certification labels translate (Halal, Kosher, Vegan, Gluten-Free, Sugar-Free)
Admin dashboard has LanguageSwitcher in sidebar
Producer dashboard has LanguageSwitcher in sidebar
Customer dashboard has LanguageSwitcher in sidebar
Influencer dashboard has LanguageSwitcher component (code verified)
Certificate page nutritional info labels translate correctly
Certificate page section headers translate (Nutritional Information, Ingredients & Origin, etc.)
Language preference persists via localStorage (hispaloshop_language key)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES was defined twice in server.py - once as dict (line 223) and once as list (line 673). The list was overwriting the dict, causing the frontend to receive an array instead of an object with language details.
Solution: Renamed the list to TRANSLATION_LANGUAGES for use in translation iteration, keeping SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES as the dict for locale config API.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Renamed SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES list to TRANSLATION_LANGUAGES to fix language dropdown
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n system fully working. Key components: 1) LocaleSelector in Header.js for main site language/country/currency selection. 2) LanguageSwitcher component used in dashboard sidebars (Admin, Producer, Customer, Influencer). 3) Backend returns languages as object with {code: {name, native}} format from /api/config/locale. 4) Translations stored in /app/frontend/src/locales/*.json for 11 languages. 5) RTL support for Arabic via document.documentElement.dir.

language_selector_header.details: LocaleSelector shows all 11 languages with native names and English names

language_selector_producer.details: LanguageSwitcher visible in Producer dashboard sidebar

bugs_fixed.issue: SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES defined twice - dict at line 223 and list at line 673. List was overwriting dict.
bugs_fixed.fix: Renamed list to TRANSLATION_LANGUAGES, updated all references that iterate over languages for translation purposes
